lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, sexual desire and anger are eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਧਨਵੰਤ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: se dhanavant jin har prabh raas |
lines.english: They alone are rich, who have the Wealth of the Lord God.
Their fear is dispelled, and they attain the state of fearlessness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਹੋਈ ਪੂਰਨ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: har jap jap hoee pooran aas |
lines.english: Chanting and meditating on the Lord, one's hopes are fulfilled.
Meeting with the Guru, Nanak meditates on his Lord and Master. ||2||
God dwells in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਨਾਨਕਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਹਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gur mil naanak har har kahiaa |3|
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, Nanak chants the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||3||
God permeates and pervades the water, the land and the sky.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਜੀਵਹਿ ਤੇਰੇ ਦਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: prabh jap jap jeeveh tere daas |
lines.english: Your slaves, O God, live by chanting and meditating on Your Name.
The eight miraculous spiritual powers and the nine treasures are contained in the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
This is bestowed when God grants His Grace.
O Nanak, the heart-lotus of the Gurmukh blossoms forth. ||4||13||
Basant, Fifth Mehl, First House, Ik-Thukay:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Meditating on the Lord, all desires are fulfilled,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਰਵਿਐ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜ ਭੋਗੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jit raviai sukh sehaj bhog |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating on Him, enjoy celestial peace and poise. ||1||Pause||
Meditate on the Lord of the Universe, who is worthy of meditation.
and the mortal is re-united with God, after having been separated for so long. ||1||
Bestowing His Mercy, He blesses us with His Glance of Grace.
God Himself takes care of His slave. ||2||
He does not consider my merits and demerits.
My bed has been beautified by His Love.
God, the Giver of Peace, has come to meet me. ||3||
Basant, Fifth Mehl:
night and day, celestial joy wells up. ||1||
The sins are erased, singing the Glories of God;
Nanak worships at the Feet of God. ||4||1||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸਾਧੂ ਜਨ ਭੇਟੇ ਨਿਤ ਰਾਤੌ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਰੰਗਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa saadhoo jan bhette nit raatau har naam rang |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By His Grace, He has led me to meet the Holy men, the humble servants of the Lord. I remain continually imbued with the love of the Lord's Name. ||1||Pause||
My mind has blossomed forth, by the touch of the Lord's Feet.
In His Mercy, the Lord of the World has revealed Himself to me.
This mind has become the dust of the Holy;
The Lord, Merciful to the meek, has attached me to the hem of His robe and saved me. ||2||
Sexual desire, anger and desire have vanished.
I behold my Lord and Master, continually, ever-present. ||3||
O Nanak, God has become kind to me. ||4||2||15||
Basant, Fifth Mehl:
He laid on His Hands, and protected His child. ||1||
God Himself has cured the disease.
Celestial peace and tranquility fill my home forever, in this springtime of the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਸਰਣੀ ਆਏ ਕਲਿਆਣ ਰੂਪ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਤੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore kee saranee aae kaliaan roop jap har har mant |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have sought the Sanctuary of the Perfect Guru; I chant the Mantra of the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, the Embodiment of emancipation. ||1||Pause||
That humble being who chants Your Name,
God Himself has dispelled my sorrow and suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਕਉ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਜਾਪਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: gur apune kau nit nit jaap |2|
lines.english: I meditate continually, continuously, on my Guru. ||2||
They meditate continually, continuously, on the Lord, the Giver of peace. ||4||3||16||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਫਲ ਪਾਏ ਨਿਹਚਲ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabh fal paae nihachal gun gaau |3|
lines.english: obtains all fruits and rewards; singing the Glories of God, he becomes steady and stable. ||3||
O Nanak, the way of the devotees is good.
Basant, Fifth Mehl:
He shows Mercy to His servant. ||1||
By His Will, He makes us happy.
The Perfect Guru makes everything perfect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੁ ਧਰਮੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਕਛੁ ਨ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: karam dharam meraa kachh na beechaario |
lines.english: He does not consider the karma of my actions, or my Dharma, my spiritual practice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦ ਮਹਿ ਦੀਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: amrit naam rid meh deea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He implants the Amrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord, in the heart. ||1||Pause||
